source_pr.body: ### What problem does this PR solve? Issue Number: close https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/18398 Problem Summary: stable test in CI ### What is changed and how it works? What's Changed,How it Works: using genport instead of const ### Related changes - n/a ### Check List Tests - No code Side effects - n/a ### Release note - No release note --- This change is [](https://reviewable.io/reviews/pingcap/tidb/18414)

evidence: evidence: PR title: make TestDispatchClientProtocol41 stable.
evidence: uses a generated port instead of a fixed one and defers server.Close() to avoid port conflicts/leaks (server/conn_test.go).
